title: PACE students push back against NLSIU decision to nullify formative assessment
description: The National Law School of India University (NLSIU), Bengaluru is facing pushback from students enrolled in its Post Graduate Diploma programmes under the Professional and Continuing Education (PACE) initiative.This, after the University nullified the results of an online Formative Assessment (FA) conducted in January 2026 and unilaterally shifted the entire course evaluation to a single 100-mark offline Summative Assessment (SA).The PACE programme's evaluation structure at the time of the Janua
